## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not work directly on `main`
- [ ] The diff only contains task-related files
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue or explained why none exists
- [ ] I considered API, schema, CLI, config, and user-visible impact
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I ran the relevant validation commands
- [ ] I did not push without explicit approval

## Validation

List the commands you ran and the result for each one.

## Release impact

- `release_impact`:
- `candidate_next_version`:
- `remaining_risks`:
